_meta.description: GitLab MCP — access merge requests, issues, commits, and pipelines

prompts.GITLAB_TOKEN: GitLab Personal Access Token (Settings → Access Tokens → read_api scope)
prompts.GITLAB_URL: Your GitLab URL (e.g. https://gitlab.com or https://gitlab.company.com)

_meta.description: Slack MCP — search messages, send messages, read channels and threads
_meta.note: Cloud connector — connect via Claude MCP registry (Settings → Connectors → Slack)

_meta.description: Atlassian MCP — access Jira issues, Confluence pages, search across projects
_meta.note: Cloud connector — connect via Claude MCP registry (Settings → Connectors → Atlassian)

_meta.description: Figma MCP — access Figma designs, components, and design tokens
_meta.note: Cloud connector — connect via Claude MCP registry (Settings → Connectors → Figma)

_meta.description: Miro MCP — access Miro boards, sticky notes, and diagrams
_meta.note: Cloud connector — connect via Claude MCP registry (Settings → Connectors → Miro)

_meta.description: Wallet MCP — query personal finances, expenses, budgets, spending categories, goals, and recurring payments (read-only)

prompts.WALLET_JWT_TOKEN: JWT token from BudgetBakers Wallet (Settings → Integrations → generate token)

_meta.note: Custom HTTP connector. For Claude Web: add at claude.ai/settings/connectors as custom connector (uses email auth instead of token).

_meta.description: Context7 MCP — fetch up-to-date documentation for any library directly into your prompt
Filesystem MCP — direct read/write access to local files and directories

prompts.FS_PATH: Path to the directory to grant access to (e.g. /Users/me/projects)

_meta.description: Git MCP — commit, push, pull, branch, merge, and all git operations
